basic_details.job_title: DHS Tiruchirappalli Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Tiruchirappall (DHS Tiruchirappall) has published the Medical Officer Notification 2026 on the official website, tiruchirappalli.nic.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Medical Officer positions. Candidates up to 40 years of age and holding an MBBS qualification are eligible to apply offline. The application process will be active until 31-07-2026, and candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and application form below.

qualification.details: MBBS with registration in Medical Council

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Tiruchirappalli Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruchirappalli.nic.in/notice_category/announcements/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DHS Tiruchirappalli Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Tiruchirappalli Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruchirappalli.nic.in/notice_category/announcements/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Tiruchirappalli Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Medical Officer position is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with valid registration from a Medical Council to be eligible for the Medical Officer position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Medical Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 63,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Medical Officer post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Medical Officer post by the District Health Society Tiruchirappalli.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Medical Officer post will be based on Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Health Society Tiruchirappalli, specifically from the announcements section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The Medical Officer position is offered on a contractual basis.
